questions.text: In a big city // you have to work very hard to survive.
If they don’t have their family // they feel lonely.
People want to get a job // so they have to move to the big city
Those who have money choose to live in a peaceful place.
For me there aren’t many criminals in small towns because in a small town people aren’t so rich.
People always want a job with a high salary and in a big city there are always places like that.

Try yourself:

Personally I believe small towns are better places to raise children because the environment is calmer.
